title: Sprint 54 Wave A: Fix GetStatus 36s timeout causing stale inventory
description: The GetStatus action can time out after 36s with no StatusEvent, leaving the agent operating on stale inventory. Add a timeout gate: if GetStatus doesn't complete within 10s, treat inventory as "not stale" and proceed rather than blocking the entire cycle. This should be a non-blocking timeout that logs a warning but doesn't stall the agent loop.
